Field Name: <!-- v2.1.0-CHANGE: Phase 3 扩展编码器列表 -->

Validation Rules: Expanded: libx264 (H.264), libx265 (H.265), libsvtavav1 (AV1), av1_nvenc (NVIDIA AV1), hevc_nvenc (NVIDIA HEVC), h264_nvenc (NVIDIA H.264), libvpx-vp9 (VP9), h264_amf (AMD), hevc_amf (AMD), h264_qsv (Intel), hevc_qsv (Intel), copy, none. Hardware encoders require detection check
Expanded: aac (default 192k), opus (128k), flac (lossless), libmp3lame (320k), alac (lossless), copy, none

Field Name: <!-- v2.1.0-CHANGE: Phase 3.5 新增质量参数字段 -->

Validation Rules: Values: crf (Constant Rate Factor), cq (Constant Quality), qp (Constant Quantization). Maps to FFmpeg -crf/-cq/-qp flag. Auto-filled when selecting preset encoder
CRF/CQ/QP numeric value, varies by encoder. Range: 0-51. 0 = disabled. Auto-filled when selecting preset encoder. Lower = better quality for CRF/CQ, higher = better quality for QP
Values: ultrafast, superfast, veryfast, faster, fast, medium, slow, slower, veryslow. Maps to FFmpeg -preset flag. Only applies when video_codec is not copy/none
Values: yuv420p (broad compatibility), yuv420p10le (HDR/10-bit), yuv422p, yuv444p. Maps to FFmpeg -pix_fmt flag. Only applies when video_codec is not copy/none
Format: '<number><unit>', e.g. '8M'. Maps to FFmpeg -maxrate flag. Requires bufsize. Only applies when video_codec is not copy/none

Field Name: <!-- v2.1.0-CHANGE: Phase 3.5.1 新增 bufsize 字段 -->

Validation Rules: Format: '<number><unit>', e.g. '2M'. Maps to FFmpeg -bufsize flag. Default 2M when max_bitrate is set but bufsize is empty. Only applies when video_codec is not copy/none
